reviews.name: Cindy K.
reviews.text: Perfect

reviews.name: Linda H.
reviews.text: Great family business. Met Matt Walsh mid Sept, very desperately needed lawn maintenance — my previous company hadn't done the lawn since Aug. Matt came by to assess and his sons were at my house the next day. All are very personable. They have now done my lawn for 6 cuts, very pleased, love the nice job they do on the edging. Would highly recommend.

reviews.name: Uwe M.
reviews.text: They have been very responsive to some unusual conditions and keep me informed.

reviews.name: Terry R.
reviews.text: Perfect job, nice guys, would always use these gentlemen.

reviews.name: Dorothy F.
reviews.text: Did not do what they said they would. Poor quality workmanship. Customer service very poor, no returned phone calls or emails.

reviews.name: Michele M.
reviews.text: They are fast and efficient, they did a phenomenal job! Definitely recommend Gold Palm lawn!

reviews.name: Carlos F.
reviews.text: Excellent work!

reviews.name: Mary S.
reviews.text: I have had several lawn companies do work for me and this company did the best job ever.

reviews.name: MIKE D.
reviews.text: Great work, on time and respectful people. Price was good also.

reviews.name: Cynthia C.
reviews.text: They work hard, efficiently, and are informative. They are true gentlemen as well.

reviews.name: Margaret L.
reviews.text: Terrible service

reviews.name: Alex D.
reviews.text: Matt and his crew of sons was great. They trimmed everything very nicely and did all that I had requested. Will definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Morgan P.
reviews.text: Wonderful people. Very friendly and personable. Excellent work.

reviews.name: Joe L.
reviews.text: I have had many different lawn care companies. No one compares to Gold Palm!

reviews.name: Coleen G.
reviews.text: Matt was on time. He was knowledgeable and explained what his team would do each week.

reviews.name: JANIS G.
reviews.text: Friendly, knowledgeable, efficient. Will definitely use them in the future for other projects.

reviews.name: RICHARD H.
reviews.text: Gold Palm responded quickly and did an excellent job!

reviews.name: Carylle B.
reviews.text: They listened to what and how we wanted our yard done, and that was important to us.

reviews.name: Joyce C.
reviews.text: Matt Walsh and his 2 sons did a fine job improving our front yard. Some who call themselves landscape designers are really just maintenance people — Walsh knows plants and where to use them effectively. Upon finishing the job, they went the extra mile by putting up, at no charge, the American flag we had just purchased. Needless to say, we highly recommend Gold Palm.

reviews.name: Patty C.
reviews.text: They were very responsive, excellent work, fair price.
